instruction: Describe how this vulnerability compares to others in terms of potential severity.
input: There is an unauthorized buffer overflow vulnerability in Tenda AX12 v22.03.01.21 _ cn. This vulnerability can cause the web service not to restart or even execute arbitrary code. It is a different vulnerability from CVE-2022-2414.
output: Buffer overflow vulnerabilities are often considered high severity due to their ability to lead to Remote Code Execution (RCE) and Denial of Service (DoS), making them critical to address.
